---
title: "Opportunities"
description: "Calls for papers, positions, fellowships, and other opportunities for ISA RC42 members."
---

## Calls & Opportunities

This page lists calls for papers, job openings, fellowships, grants, awards, and other professional opportunities relevant to the RC42 Social Psychology community.

::: {.placeholder-notice}
No opportunities are currently listed. Opportunities will be published here as they are submitted and approved by the RC42 board.
:::

### Types of Opportunities

- **Calls for papers** — Conference sessions, special issues, edited volumes
- **Positions** — Faculty positions, postdoctoral fellowships, research positions
- **Fellowships & grants** — Research funding, visiting fellowships, travel grants
- **Awards** — Best paper awards, dissertation awards, career awards
- **Other** — Workshops, summer schools, collaborative projects

### Submit an Opportunity

If you know of an opportunity relevant to the RC42 community, please submit it through the [contribution form](../participate/submit-contribution.qmd).

::: {.info-box}
All submissions are reviewed by the RC42 board before publication. Opportunities are listed as a service to the community and do not imply endorsement by RC42 or ISA.
:::
